   133	  DevAssert(out != NULL);
   134	
   135	// Bit reversal implementation based on https://wunkolo.github.io/post/2020/11/gf2p8affineqb-bit-reversal/
   136	#if defined(__GFNI__) && defined(__AVX512F__)
   137	  int simde_sz = 64;
   138	  int i = 0;
   139	  int simde_bound = sz - simde_sz;
   140	  for (; i <= simde_bound; i += simde_sz) {
   141	    __m512i input = _mm512_loadu_epi8(&in[i]);
   142	    __m512i reversed = _mm512_gf2p8affine_epi64_epi8(input, _mm512_set1_epi64(0x8040201008040201), 0);
   143	    _mm512_storeu_epi8(&out[i], reversed);
   144	  }
   145	
   146	  for (; i < sz; ++i) {
   147	    out[i] = bit_reverse_table_256[in[i]];
   148	  }
   149	#else
   150	  for(size_t i = 0; i < sz; ++i)
   151	    out[i] = bit_reverse_table_256[in[i]];
   152	#endif

   159	  // n_bits: 10
   160	  // in:      10 0000 1111
   161	  // return:  11 1100 0001
   162	
   163	  AssertFatal(n_bits <= 64, "Maximum bits to reverse is 64, impossible to reverse %d bits!\n", n_bits);

   168	  for (int n = 0; n < n_bytes; n++) {
   169	    q[n_bytes - 1 - n] = bit_reverse_table_256[p[n]];
   170	  }

   175	    rev_bits |= ((in >> i) & 0x1) << (n_bits - i - 1);
   176	  }
   177	  return rev_bits;
